name: Club Sandwich
description: Toasted double-decker sandwich with fresh vegetables, cheese, and house mayo.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Rich and creamy dish of paneer (cottage cheese) in a tomato and cashew gravy.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant long-grain basmati rice cooked with succulent chicken pieces and traditional spices.

name: Butter Naan
description: Soft and fluffy Indian flatbread glazed with melted butter.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic 10-inch pizza topped with fresh tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and basil leaves.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Chilled blended coffee with milk, sugar, and a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
